top.headline: Iran war sparks 'fundamental energy transition' in Seoul toward renewables: Energy minister
top.summary: Kim said South Korea will focus on wind and solar power to achieve its goal of reaching 100 gigawatts renewable energy capacity

top.headline: Anthropic rolls out Claude Opus 4.7, an AI model that is less risky than Mythos
top.summary: Claude Mythos Preview is Anthropic's most powerful AI model that excels at identifying weaknesses and security flaws within software.

top.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 50 of the US-Iran conflict?
top.summary: Iran reopens the Strait of Hormuz with conditions and threatens closure if the US blockade of Iranian ports continues.

top.headline: Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
top.summary: Vice President JD Vance, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Joint Chiefs Chairman Dan Caine will work with Israel and Lebanon, Trump said.

top.headline: Trump thanks Gulf states for their ‘tremendous’ support
top.summary: ‘This will be a great and brilliant day for the world’ Donald Trump said as Iran fully opens the Strait of Hormuz.

top.headline: Iran war live: Tehran says US blockade of ports must end as strait opens
top.summary: Tens of thousands of people forcibly displaced by Israeli attacks on Lebanon use first day of ceasefire to return home.

top.headline: Cina: export marzo delude
top.summary: La crescita delle esportazioni cinesi a marzo è stata inferiore alle stime a causa dell'aumento dei costi energetici, mentre le importazioni sono aumentate più del previsto. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto negativo sui mercati globali.

top.headline: Acquisto di Salesforce
top.summary: Michael Burry compra azioni di Salesforce e altri software dopo una vendita guidata dall'intelligenza artificiale. Non crede che le pressioni tecniche influenzeranno a lungo questi titoli.

top.headline: Didi lancia test robotaxi negli Emirati
top.summary: La società di ride-hailing Didi pianifica di iniziare il suo primo test di robotaxi all'estero negli Emirati Arabi Uniti. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto positivo sul settore tecnologico.

top.headline: FXJSC Combined Operations and Legal Sub-Committee Meeting
top.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC) Operations and Legal Sub-Committees. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.

top.headline: Minutes of the London FXJSC Main Committee Meeting – 27 November 2025
top.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC), which is a forum for discussion of the wholesale foreign exchange market. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.

top.headline: Christine Lagarde: IMFC Statement
top.summary: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency.

top.headline: Lebanon president says country is no longer a pawn amid Israel ceasefire
top.summary: President Joseph Aoun promised to work to preserve Lebanon's sovereignty and freedom.

top.headline: Will the ceasefire in Lebanon hold?
top.summary: Lebanon and Israel are holding first direct talks in decades.

top.headline: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
top.summary: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

top.headline: Iran rejects Trump claim on deal to surrender nuclear material stockpiles
top.summary: Iran has rejected suggestions by Donald Trump that it has agreed to hand over its stockpile of enriched uranium.

top.headline: World reacts to Strait of Hormuz reopening amid US-Iran conflict
top.summary: Politicians and industry welcome reopening of the vital waterway after throttling of traffic caused oil prices to spike.

top.headline: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
top.summary: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

top.headline: Netflix stock sinks after streamer reiterates guidance, says Reed Hastings to exit board
top.summary: Netflix beat expectations for Q1 revenue and reported a big jump in earnings per share thanks in part to a termination fee related to its proposed WBD deal.

top.headline: Segretario al Tesoro sostiene tagli tassi
top.summary: Il Segretario al Tesoro Bessent sostiene i tagli ai tassi di interesse per sostenere la crescita economica, ma comprende se la Fed decidesse di attendere. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sui settori finanziari e obbligazionari.

top.headline: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
top.summary: A 10-day truce between the two countries is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

top.headline: BBC in Iran: 'Tehran does not think it has lost this war'
top.summary: Lyse Doucet says Iranians want a solution to the long-running animosity with the US, but leaders is not willing to make a deal on Washington's terms.

top.headline: Oil Tankers Test Hormuz Reopening
top.summary: Oil tankers are beginning to test the waters at the Strait of Hormuz. At least eight crude carriers started advancing toward the chokepoint within hours of Iran declaring the Strait open to shipping under a ceasefire framework. Five vessels that had been idling north of Dubai moved first, followed by three more positioned roughly 70 miles west, according to vessel tracking data cited by Bloomberg. It’s the first real sign of life in a corridor that has effectively been frozen since late February, when conflict in the region choked off flows…

top.headline: Philip R. Lane: The economic outlook and monetary policy in the euro area
Recessione globale inevitabile
top.summary: La chiusura prolungata dello Stretto di Hormuz potrebbe portare a una recessione globale. Ciò avrebbe un impatto significativo sui settori energetico e del mercato azionario.

top.headline: Fed pubblica verbali riunioni tassi
top.summary: I verbali delle riunioni della Fed sui tassi di sconto potrebbero influenzare il mercato. Gli investitori attendono con ansia eventuali segnali di politica monetaria.

articles.title: Oil Tankers Test Hormuz Reopening
articles.summary_en: Oil tankers are beginning to test the waters at the Strait of Hormuz. At least eight crude carriers started advancing toward the chokepoint within hours of Iran declaring the Strait open to shipping under a ceasefire framework. Five vessels that had been idling north of Dubai moved first, followed by three more positioned roughly 70 miles west, according to vessel tracking data cited by Bloomberg. It’s the first real sign of life in a corridor that has effectively been frozen since late February, when conflict in the region choked off flows…

articles.title: The Overlooked War China Is Desperate to Contain
articles.summary_en: As US President Donald Trump says the war in Iran could be over "very soon" and Pakistani mediators in Tehran prepare to meet with officials, another nearby conflict has been drawing Beijing's attention. Since late February, fighting between Afghanistan and Pakistan has intensified, with Islamabad declaring an "open war" with its neighbor. Strikes have killed hundreds and displaced hundreds of thousands, according to the United Nations Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs in Afghanistan. The conflict has alarmed the international…

articles.title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
articles.summary_it: La chiusura prolungata dello Stretto di Hormuz potrebbe portare a una recessione globale. Ciò avrebbe un impatto significativo sui settori energetico e del mercato azionario.
articles.summary_en: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.

articles.title: Hormuz blockade could deepen world’s worst energy crisis — and risk a dangerous misstep
articles.summary_it: Il blocco navale USA dello Stretto di Hormuz potrebbe interrompere il traffico di petroliere, aumentando i prezzi del petrolio e rischiando di coinvolgere la Cina in un conflitto con Washington.
articles.summary_en: The U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz threatens to halt more tanker traffic, sending oil surging and risks drawing China into a widening confrontation with Washington.

articles.title: Minutes of the Board’s discount rate meetings on February 9 and March 18, 2026
articles.summary_it: I verbali delle riunioni della Fed sui tassi di sconto potrebbero influenzare il mercato. Gli investitori attendono con ansia eventuali segnali di politica monetaria.
articles.summary_en: Minutes of the Board’s discount rate meetings on February 9 and March 18, 2026

articles.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
articles.headline_it: Segretario al Tesoro sostiene tagli tassi
articles.summary_it: Il Segretario al Tesoro Bessent sostiene i tagli ai tassi di interesse per sostenere la crescita economica, ma comprende se la Fed decidesse di attendere. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sui settori finanziari e obbligazionari.
articles.summary_en: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.

articles.title: China exports growth in March misses estimates, imports surge most in over four years
articles.summary_it: La crescita delle esportazioni cinesi a marzo è stata inferiore alle stime a causa dell'aumento dei costi energetici, mentre le importazioni sono aumentate più del previsto. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto negativo sui mercati globali.
articles.summary_en: China's export growth slowed in March as manufacturers grappled with surging energy costs, with the Iran war disrupting supplies, while imports jumped more than expected.

articles.title: We spoke to dozens of central bankers, policymakers and politicians about the Iran war — These are their biggest fears for the global economy
articles.summary_it: La guerra tra Stati Uniti e Iran potrebbe portare a stagflazione e problemi di sicurezza energetica, secondo i responsabili politici e i banchieri centrali. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sull'economia globale.
articles.summary_en: From stagflation to energy security, policymakers spoke to CNBC about the biggest risks arising from the ongoing U.S.-Iran war.

articles.title: Fed Governor Waller says Iran war and labor market risks are keeping central bank on hold
articles.summary_it: La Fed è cauta sui tassi a causa dei rischi economici. La situazione in Iran e il mercato del lavoro influenzano la decisione.
articles.summary_en: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller on Friday said current economic conditions are complicating the approach to interest rates.

articles.title: New York Fed President Williams worries war will slow growth, aggravate inflation
articles.summary_it: Il presidente della Fed di New York, Williams, prevede una possibile rallentata della crescita economica a causa della guerra, con un aumento dell'incertezza e dell'inflazione.
articles.summary_en: Williams noted that the conflict has "intensified the uncertainty" around national and local conditions.

articles.title: Here are all the ways the Iran war has affected the U.S. economy so far
articles.summary_it: La guerra con l'Iran inizia a mostrare effetti sull'economia statunitense in modi sia ovvi che nascosti. Ciò potrebbe influenzare i settori energetici e il mercato azionario più ampio.
articles.summary_en: The Iran war is starting to show up in the U.S. economy in ways both obvious and not so much.

articles.title: U.S. says Hormuz blockade 'fully implemented,' while signaling diplomatic off-ramp for Iran
articles.headline_it: Stati Uniti: blocco dello Stretto di Hormuz
articles.summary_it: La Casa Bianca segnala una possibile soluzione diplomatica al conflitto in Medio Oriente, mentre proseguono le discussioni per continuare i negoziati con Teheran. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto sul settore energetico.
articles.summary_en: The White House has been signaling a diplomatic solution to the conflict in the Middle East, as discussions around continuing negotiations with Tehran are underway.

articles.title: Persian Gulf oil recovery will take months once war ends, Strait of Hormuz opens
articles.summary_it: La ripresa della produzione di petrolio nel Medio Oriente richiederà diversi mesi dopo la fine della guerra, con un prolungato periodo di scarsità nel mercato.
articles.summary_en: Middle East oil producers will require several months to fully restore output once the war ends, assuming the Strait of Hormuz is fully reopened, promising extended tightness in markets,

articles.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open to shipping but Trump says U.S. blockade still active
articles.summary_it: La disputa tra Stati Uniti e Iran sulla tregua influisce sul settore energetico. La situazione potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sui mercati.
articles.summary_en: The Strait of Hormuz has remained almost completely closed as the U.S. and Iran have disputed the terms of their ceasefire agreement.

articles.title: U.S. oil price plunges below $84 as Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open, easing supply fears
articles.summary_it: Il prezzo del petrolio è crollato di oltre l'11% dopo che l'Iran ha dichiarato aperto lo Stretto di Hormuz, riducendo le preoccupazioni per l'approvvigionamento. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sugli ETF del settore energetico e delle commodity.
articles.summary_en: Oil prices tumbled more than 11% after Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz open amid a ceasefire deal with Lebanon.

articles.title: Video shows ships turning away from the Strait of Hormuz as confusion persists over whether sea lane is really open
articles.summary_it: Nonostante la dichiarazione dell'Iran, lo Stretto di Hormuz rimane chiuso, influenzando il mercato energetico. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sui prezzi del petrolio e sulle commodity.
articles.summary_en: The Strait of Hormuz remained effectively closed despite Iran's declaration Friday that it is open, maritime freight and oil analysts told CNBC.

articles.title: Trump says war in Iran is going 'swimmingly' and 'should be ending pretty soon'
articles.headline_it: Trump: guerra in Iran finirà presto
articles.summary_it: Le dichiarazioni di Trump sulla fine della guerra contro l'Iran potrebbero influenzare i mercati energetici e il mercato azionario in generale. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto positivo sul settore energetico.
articles.summary_en: President Donald Trump's latest prediction on the end of the war against Iran came hours after Israel announced a ceasefire with Lebanon.

articles.title: (Research Paper) The Limited Effects of Post-Pandemic U.S. Monetary Policy Tightening: Demand Composition and the Credit Channel
articles.summary_it: La stretta monetaria post-pandemica negli USA ha avuto effetti limitati. Ciò potrebbe influenzare i settori finanziari e dei bond.

articles.title: Michael Burry buys the dip in Salesforce and other software stocks after AI-fueled sell-off
articles.summary_it: Michael Burry compra azioni di Salesforce e altri software dopo una vendita guidata dall'intelligenza artificiale. Non crede che le pressioni tecniche influenzeranno a lungo questi titoli.
articles.summary_en: "I do not believe the technical pressures brought on by the private credit/software debt issues are big enough to affect these stocks for much longer," he said.

articles.title: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
articles.headline_it: Didi lancia test robotaxi negli Emirati
articles.summary_it: La società di ride-hailing Didi pianifica di iniziare il suo primo test di robotaxi all'estero negli Emirati Arabi Uniti. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto positivo sul settore tecnologico.
articles.summary_en: Ride-hailing company Didi plans to begin its first overseas robotaxi test in the United Arab Emirates later this year.

articles.title: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks
articles.summary_it: Le dichiarazioni di Jamie Dimon evidenziano come la tecnologia possa rappresentare una minaccia per la sicurezza informatica. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto negativo sul settore tecnologico.
articles.summary_en: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.

articles.title: Gold rises to one-month high as Strait of Hormuz called 'completely open'
articles.summary_it: L'oro e l'argento salgono dopo l'annuncio dell'Iran sulla riapertura dello Stretto di Hormuz, riducendo i rischi di recessione. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto positivo sul settore delle commodity.
articles.summary_en: Gold and silver settled higher as Iran's announcement that the Strait of Hormuz is open to commercial traffic could set a path for ending the Middle East war and reducing recessionary risks.

articles.title: U.S. tech companies ramp up government lobbying amid Iran war uncertainty
articles.summary_it: Le aziende tecnologiche statunitensi aumentano la loro influenza sul governo a causa dell'incertezza legata alla guerra in Iran. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto sul settore tecnologico e di conseguenza sui mercati più ampi.
articles.summary_en: A White House spokesperson told CNBC the administration had been working with industry leaders to mitigate disruption brought about by the conflict.

articles.title: Israel's central bank chief pins hopes on peace as economic shock looms
articles.summary_it: Il governatore della banca centrale israeliana spera in una rapida risoluzione dei conflitti per evitare uno shock economico. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto sui mercati internazionali.
articles.summary_en: Israel's central bank governor hopes a swift resolution to the wars in Lebanon and Iran can ease a growth shock.

articles.title: Spain touts energy resilience to Iran war as Trump tensions cast shadow over trade
articles.summary_it: La Spagna ha aumentato gli investimenti in tecnologie solari e eoliche negli ultimi anni, migliorando la propria resilienza energetica.
articles.summary_en: The southern European country has ramped up its investment in solar and wind technologies in recent years.

articles.title: Asia markets mostly fall as fragile Middle East ceasefire tempers sentiment
articles.summary_it: I mercati asiatici sono scesi a causa della fragile tregua in Medio Oriente, nonostante i record di Wall Street. Ciò ha ridotto l'appetito per il rischio.
articles.summary_en: Most Asia-Pacific markets traded lower Friday as an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire tempered risk appetite, even after Wall Street closed at fresh record highs.

articles.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Community Bankshares, Inc.
articles.summary_it: La Federal Reserve ha intrapreso un'azione di enforcement contro Community Bankshares, Inc., un'azienda bancaria. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto sul settore finanziario.
articles.summary_en: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Community Bankshares, Inc.
